layer-order.css:
/* Generated by Lowdefy build */
@layer theme, base, antd, components, utilities;

properties.subTitle: Sorry, the page you are visiting does not exist.

oneOf.description: Shorthand for a single requestId.
An array of requestIds to call.
Request parameters.
Shorthand for pageId.
Link parameters.

url.description: An external URL to link to.

newWindow.description: Open the link in a new window.

input.description: Input to pass to the linked page.

params.description: Key-value pairs to set in the page state.

oneOf.description: Shorthand for a single blockId to validate.
An array of blockIds to validate.

duration.description: Duration in seconds before the message disappears. Set to 0 for persistent.

params.description: Key-value pairs to set in the global state.
Parameters passed to the login method.

callbackUrl.description: URL to redirect to after login.

darkMode.description: Set dark mode preference. When not provided, cycles through light, dark, and system.

logo.description: Header logo settings. By default, images are served from the app public folder and auto-swap between light and dark variants based on dark mode. See Hosting Files for details.

src.description: Logo image URL for desktop. Defaults to logo-light-theme.png or logo-dark-theme.png from the public folder (~250x72px), auto-selected based on dark mode.

srcMobile.description: Logo image URL for mobile. Defaults to logo-square-light-theme.png or logo-square-dark-theme.png from the public folder (~125x125px), auto-selected based on dark mode.

breakpoint.description: Viewport width breakpoint (in px) for switching between mobile and desktop logo. Default is 577.

oneOf.description: List of breadcrumb links.
List of breadcrumb links.

pageId.description: Page id to link to when clicked.

style.description: Css style to apply to link.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to use an icon in breadcrumb link.

title.description: Menu item title.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon on menu item.

menuLg.description: Menu large screen properties. Overwrites menu properties on desktop screen sizes.

menuMd.description: Mobile menu properties. Overwrites menu properties on mobile screen sizes.

notifications.description: Notification bell icon with badge in the header. Renders when configured. Use the link property to navigate when clicked.

link.description: Link to navigate to when the notification bell is clicked.

count.description: Number to display on the badge. Set to 0 to hide the badge (unless showZero is true).

dot.description: Show a dot instead of a count number.

showZero.description: Show badge when count is zero.

overflowCount.description: Max count to show. Values above this display as "N+".

icon.description: Icon for the notification button. Defaults to AiOutlineBell.

profile.description: Profile avatar with optional dropdown menu in the header. Renders when configured. Use with the _user operator to populate from the authenticated user.

src.description: Image URL for the avatar. Typically bound to _user: image.

content.description: Text content inside the avatar (e.g. user initials). Shown when no src is provided.

icon.description: Icon to display in avatar when no src or content is set. Defaults to AiOutlineUser.

color.description: Background color of the avatar when not using src.

links.description: Dropdown menu items. Uses the same MenuLink/MenuGroup/MenuDivider schema as Menu. Compatible with _menu operator output for access-filtered menus.

style.description: CSS style applied to the link.

title.description: Menu item title.

danger.description: Apply danger style to menu item.

dashed.description: Whether the divider line is dashed.

shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcut. Renders a shortcut badge next to the label. Use "mod" for Cmd/Ctrl.

placement.description: Dropdown placement relative to the avatar.

darkModeToggle.description: Show a dark mode toggle button in the header. Toggles the Ant Design dark theme for the entire page. Preference is persisted to localStorage.

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

.headerActions.description: The header actions container (notifications, profile, dark mode toggle).

.profile.description: The profile avatar and dropdown wrapper.

.darkModeToggle.description: The PageHeaderMenu dark mode toggle button.

.headerActions.description: The header actions container (notifications, profile, dark mode toggle).

.profile.description: The profile avatar and dropdown wrapper.

.darkModeToggle.description: The PageHeaderMenu dark mode toggle button.

onMenuItemClick.description: Trigger action when menu item is clicked.

onMenuItemSelect.description: Trigger action when menu item is selected.

onOpen.description: Trigger action when mobile menu is open.

description.description: Trigger action when a profile dropdown menu item is clicked.

event.keyPath: The key path of the menu item.
event.pageId: The page id of the menu item.
event.url: The url of the menu item.

onToggleMenuGroup.description: Trigger action when mobile menu group is opened.

inner.description: Change the card style to inner.

content.description: Box content string. Overrides the "content" content area.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the Box is clicked.

direction.description: List content along a 'row' or down a 'column'. Applies the 'flex-direction' css property to the List block.

wrap.description: Specifies wrapping style to be applied to List block as 'wrap', 'nowrap' or 'wrap-reverse'. Applies the 'flex-wrap' css property to the List block - defaults to 'wrap', requires List direction to be set.

scroll.description: Specifies whether scrolling should be applied to the List, can be true or false. Applies the 'overflow' css property to the List block - defaults to 'visible', requires List direction to be set.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the List is clicked.

ariaLabel.description: Arial-label to apply to link tag.

back.description: When the link is clicked, trigger the browser back.

home.description: When the link is clicked, route to the home page.

input.description: When the link is clicked, pass data as the input object to the next Lowdefy page.  Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

urlQuery.description: When the link is clicked, pass data as a url query to the next page.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block for anchor icon.

pageId.description: When the link is clicked, route to the provided Lowdefy page.

href.description: The href to link to when the anchor link is clicked.

url.description: External url to link to when the anchor link is clicked.

rel.description: The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

newTab.description: Open link in a new tab when the anchor link is clicked.

replace.description: Prevent adding a new entry into browser history by replacing the url instead of pushing into history. Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

scroll.description: Disable scrolling to the top of the page after page transition. Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

title.description: Text to display in the anchor.

onClick.description: Called when Anchor is clicked. Renders a shortcut badge when a shortcut is configured.

html.description: Content to be rendered as Html.

DOMPurifyOptions.description: Customize DOMPurify options. Options are only applied when the block is mounted, thus any parsed settings is only applied at first render.

html.description: Content to be rendered as Html.

onTextSelection.description: Trigger action when text is selected and pass selected text to the event object.

name.description: Name of icon to be displayed.

rotate.description: Number of degrees to rotate the icon.

title.description: Icon hover title for accessibility.

disableLoadingIcon.description: While loading after the icon has been clicked, don't render the loading icon.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when icon is clicked.

alt.description: Alternative text description of the image.

crossOrigin.description: Indicates if the fetching of the image must be done using a CORS request.

decoding.description: An image decoding hint to the browser. Sync for atomic presentation with other content, async,  to reduce delay in presenting other content and auto leave to browser to decide.

loading.description: How the browser should load the image. Eager loads the image immediately, lazy, defers loading until the image it reaches a calculated distance from the viewport, as defined by the browser.

sizes.description: Indicating a set of source sizes of strings separated by commas.

srcSet.description: Possible image sources for the user agent to use, strings separated by commas.

content.description: Span content string. Overrides the "content" content area.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the Span is clicked.

message.default: Intentional error thrown by Throw block

lines.description: Number of paragraph lines of the skeleton.

plugins/icons.js:
import { AiOutlineExclamationCircle, AiOutlineLoading3Quarters, AiOutlineDashboard, AiOutlineTeam, AiOutlineShoppingCart, AiOutlineBarChart, AiOutlineSetting, AiOutlineSearch, AiOutlinePlus, AiOutlineGoogle, AiOutlineFileSearch } from 'react-icons/ai';
export default {
  AiOutlineExclamationCircle,
  AiOutlineLoading3Quarters,
